codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: Axum bind moved to 127.0.0.1:3001, startup logging updated, README/AGENTS port references aligned, stale Local Dev Quirk removed, and evidence in the handoff/transcript confirms 3001 health success, 3000 failure, and browser upload flow through the new port.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, and commit diff for m1-port-3001-migration. No regressions or requirement gaps were found; feature passes scrutiny.
